name: zhannacloset
description: My Closet — personal digital wardrobe organizer

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "node --watch -r ./scripts/load-env.cjs server-dev.js" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix client install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix client run build
